title: cressa cretica var. loscosii
intro: Cressa cretica var. loscosii, also known as Loscos' cressa or small cressa, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cressa cretica var. loscosii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, headache, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
